data.title: Hakimi Market Value Surges Over $19 Million Amid Volatility
data.description: Hakimi's market value has surged past $19 million, currently reported at $18.9 million, with a daily increase of over 90%. According to ChainCatcher, the meme coin's price fluctuations are significant, and investors are advised to be cautious of the associated risks.

data.title: Polymarket has added a new listing: "Deadline for Claude developer Anthropic's next funding round."
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, a new event has been added to Polymarket: "Claude developer Anthropic's next funding round deadline." The probability of the funding round being completed by the end of June is currently estimated at 22%, and by the end of December at 81%. The event's contract rules state that if the designated company publicly and officially announces the completion of its next funding round by the specified date (Eastern Time), the market will be classified as "Yes." Otherwise, the market will be classified as "No." A valid announcement must clearly confirm the completion of the new funding round, which can be confirmed through official announcements from the designated company (such as press releases) or its investors, regulatory documents, or consensus from credible media reports. Informal announcements, statements from anonymous sources, or leaks are not acceptable. If the designated company is unable to complete the new funding round due to acquisition, merger, or absorption by another entity, the market will be classified as "No." The primary settlement source for this market will be the designated company's official announcements and official company documents, such as SEC filings; however, credible consensus reports are also acceptable. Odaily Seer continuously monitors prediction markets, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Polymarket has added a new article titled "When Will Powell Step Down as Fed Chair?", with a preliminary probability of 20% for the event occurring between June 6th and 12th.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that Polymarket has launched a new event, "When will Powell step down as Fed Chair?" Currently, the highest probability (20%) is between June 6th and 12th, followed by May 30th to June 5th (18%). The event contract rules state that this market will settle based on a specified date range for Powell's resignation as Fed Chair. "Resignation" means Powell is no longer effectively serving as Fed Chair. An announcement of Powell's resignation or dismissal does not alone qualify. The scheduled end of Powell's term does not alone qualify. If Powell continues to serve as interim chair (e.g., until a successor is confirmed), he will not be considered to have resigned. This market is limited to the period during which Powell serves as Fed Chair. Powell's status as a regular member of the Fed Board of Governors does not affect the settlement of this market. All dates are in Eastern Time. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing in.

data.title: Token Outperforms Bitcoin and Ether Amid Consolidation
data.description:
A specific token has shown a slight edge over bitcoin and ether in the past week, marking a notable performance in the cryptocurrency market. According to CoinDesk, despite this advancement, the token's movement remains within consolidation territory due to reduced participation from traders and investors. This trend highlights the ongoing volatility and unpredictability in the crypto space, where market dynamics can shift rapidly based on various factors.

The token's performance comes at a time when the broader cryptocurrency market is experiencing fluctuations, with major players like bitcoin and ether facing challenges in maintaining upward momentum. The thinning participation suggests that while the token has managed to outperform its larger counterparts, the overall market sentiment remains cautious. Investors are closely monitoring these developments, as they could signal potential shifts in investment strategies and market behavior.

As the cryptocurrency landscape continues to evolve, the performance of individual tokens can offer insights into emerging trends and investor preferences. The current consolidation phase indicates a period of uncertainty, where market participants are evaluating their positions and strategies. This environment underscores the importance of staying informed and adaptable in the fast-paced world of digital assets, where opportunities and risks coexist.

data.title: Hakimi's market capitalization surpassed $19 million, surging over 90% intraday.
data.description: According to GMGN data, Hakimi's market capitalization has surged past $19 million, currently trading at $18.9 million, representing a daily increase of over 90%. Odaily reminds users that Meme's price is highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: XRP Rises 8% in a Week, Outperforming Bitcoin and Ether
data.description: XRP has experienced an 8% increase over the past week, with a daily rise of approximately 3%, surpassing the performance of both Bitcoin and Ether. According to NS3.AI, the price of XRP is approaching $1.43, although it remains below the $1.44 resistance level despite several attempts to break through.

data.title: Binance's $530 million record high has hit a new all-time high.
data.description: According to GMGN market data, Binance Life's market capitalization has broken all-time high, currently trading at $530 million, with a daily increase of over 50%.

data.title: China's Clean Technology Exports Surge Amid Global Energy Shift
data.description: China's exports of clean technology saw a significant increase in March, highlighting the country's growing role in the global shift towards alternative energy sources. Bloomberg posted on X, noting that this surge comes as manufacturers capitalize on the rising demand for clean energy solutions, driven by disruptions in traditional energy supplies due to the ongoing conflict in Iran. This trend underscores China's strategic positioning in the clean energy sector, as it continues to expand its influence in the global market.

data.title: Polymarket Sees Surge in WTI Oil Price Prediction for April 2026
data.description:
Polymarket has reported a significant increase in the probability of WTI crude oil prices dropping to $75 in April 2026, with the current probability standing at 39%, marking a 25% rise over the past 24 hours. According to ChainCatcher, the total trading volume for this event contract has exceeded $40 million.

The contract rules specify that if the highest price of any one-minute candlestick for WTI crude oil futures during April 2026 equals or exceeds the listed price, the market will be deemed 'yes'; otherwise, it will be 'no'. Previously, the March WTI oil price prediction contract stipulated that if the official settlement price of the Chicago Mercantile Exchange's crude oil futures contract for the current active month equals or exceeds the listed price by the last trading day of March 2026, the market will be deemed 'yes'; otherwise, it will be 'no'.

U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that negotiations regarding the Iran conflict will continue over the weekend. When asked if Iran might impose restrictions or tolls on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, Trump asserted, "Absolutely not," and "There will be no tolls." Trump also mentioned receiving "quite good news" regarding the Iran issue but declined to provide further details. "Twenty minutes ago, we heard some quite good news, and it seems that progress in the Middle East concerning Iran is going very well," Trump told reporters aboard Air Force One. When asked about the specifics of the good news, Trump replied, "You will hear about it. I think it's something that should happen. It's the right thing to do, and I think it will happen. We'll see, but I think it will happen."

data.title: Polymarket's probability that "WTI crude oil will fall to $75 in April 2026" has risen to 39%, a 25% increase in the last 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the probability of Polymarket's prediction that "WTI crude oil will fall to $75 in April 2026" has increased significantly, reaching 65% this morning and currently trading at 39%, a 25% increase in the last 24 hours. As of now, the total trading volume of Polymarket's "WTI crude oil April 2026 price" event contract has exceeded $40 million. The rules for this event contract are: if the highest price of any 1-minute candlestick chart for the most active month of WTI crude oil futures during April 2026 is equal to or higher than the listing price, the market will determine it as "yes"; otherwise, it will determine it as "no." Previously, the rules for the WTI crude oil March price prediction event contract were: if the official settlement price of the current most active month (near-month) of the CME Group crude oil futures contract on any trading day is equal to or higher than the listing price up to the last trading day of March 2026, the market will determine it as "yes"; otherwise, it will determine it as "no." US President Trump has stated that negotiations regarding a war with Iran will continue over the weekend. When asked whether Iran would impose restrictions or tolls on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said, "Absolutely not," and "There will be no tolls." Trump had previously said there was some "pretty good news" about Iran, but he declined to provide further details. "We heard some pretty good news 20 minutes ago. It seems there's very good progress on the Middle East with Iran," Trump told reporters aboard Air Force One. When asked what the so-called good news was, Trump said, "You'll hear it. I think it should happen. It's a given. And I think it will happen. We'll see, but I think it will happen." Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Bitdeer Reports Zero Bitcoin Holdings Despite Mining Output
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, has released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. According to Odaily, as of the week ending April 17, Bitdeer produced 177 BTC through mining activities. However, the company sold an equivalent amount of 177 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net addition of zero BTC to its holdings. Bitdeer continues to maintain zero Bitcoin holdings.

data.title: Profitable Account Invests in Rangers Victory on Polymarket
data.description:
A significant investment has been made in the outcome of the MLB regular season game between the Texas Rangers and the Seattle Mariners. According to Odaily, an account with profits exceeding $500,000 has purchased positions worth approximately $630,000 favoring a Rangers victory, with an average opening price of 74.4¢.

The game is set to take place at local time, with both teams closely ranked in their division, though the Rangers hold a slight advantage. Odaily Seer continues to monitor prediction markets, observing changes before pricing.

data.title: Topnod, a self-hosted wallet, has officially become the official wallet of the Layer 1 public chain Pharos, creating a native Web2 entry point.
data.description: With the Pharos mainnet launch imminent, Topnod wallet has officially become an official partner of the Layer 1 public chain Pharos. As a native Web2 entry point into the Pharos ecosystem, Topnod aims to break down the entry barriers in the RWA (Real-Time Asset Wafer) field through an interactive experience that requires no mnemonic phrases and allows for instant on-the-flying. It is reported that Topnod will provide deep support for the official airdrop event after Pharos TGE, allowing users to directly earn $PROS rewards and conduct on-chain transactions within their Topnod wallets. As one of the core entry points, Topnod will also empower the distribution of RWA assets on the Pharos chain in the future, helping Web2 users seamlessly capture real on-chain earnings.

data.title: Bitdeer currently maintains zero holdings, having sold 177 BTC this week.
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. As of the week ending April 17, its Bitcoin mining output was 177 BTC, but it sold 177 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net increase of 0 BTC. It currently maintains a zero Bitcoin holding.

data.title: An account with over $500,000 in profits purchased $630,000 worth of MLB regular season games, resulting in the Rangers defeating the Mariners.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, in the Polymarket prediction event for the MLB regular season game between the Texas Rangers and the Seattle Mariners, an account with profits exceeding $500,000 (0x5d58e38cd0a7e6f5fa67b7f9c2f70dd70df09a15) purchased approximately $630,000 in a winning Rangers position, with an average opening price of 74.4¢. The MLB regular season game between the Texas Rangers and the Seattle Mariners will be played locally. The two teams are closely ranked in their divisions, with the Rangers having a slight advantage. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $664 million yesterday, marking the fourth consecutive day of net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $664 million yesterday (April 17th, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF (IBIT) saw the largest single-day net inflow of $284 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $64.633 billion. The Fidelity ETF (FBTC) followed with a net inflow of $163 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $11.009 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $101.453 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.55%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $57.74 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $127 million yesterday, marking the seventh consecutive day of net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $127 million yesterday (April 17th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net inflow of $84.1344 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $2.356 billion. This was followed by the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a net inflow of $30.7951 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.83 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs was $14.263 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.87%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $11.944 billion.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Addresses Speculation on Military Action in Cuba
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump was questioned aboard Air Force One on April 18 regarding reports suggesting the Pentagon is preparing for military operations in Cuba. According to BlockBeats, Trump did not confirm or deny the reports, stating, "It depends on what your definition of 'military action' is."

data.title: TRON Integrates deBridge's Model Context Protocol for Enhanced Cross-Chain Capabilities
data.description:
TRON has announced the integration of deBridge's Model Context Protocol (MCP) server into its network, enhancing seamless cross-chain execution capabilities. According to Odaily, this integration provides a unified interface that allows developers and AI agents to programmatically access multi-chain liquidity, routing, and transaction execution capabilities, facilitating smoother cross-chain operations.

This integration not only introduces new technological access but also strengthens TRON's infrastructure potential in connecting payments, asset gateways, and multi-chain execution capabilities within AI agent scenarios.

data.title: Bridge Platform Expands Support for Solana-Based USDT Transactions
data.description: Bridge, a payment platform, has announced the addition of support for USDT deposits and withdrawals on the Solana blockchain. According to Foresight News, this new feature is now available to all developers utilizing the Wallets API and providing a Solana address.
